name: Tamron SP 70-200mm f/2.8 Di VC USD G2
description: A popular telephoto zoom for a variety of shooting applications, this Canon EF-mount SP 70-200mm f/2.8 Di VC USD G2 Lens from Tamron is characterized by its bright f/2.8 constant maximum aperture, as well as sophisticated optical and physical designs.

features.Key Features:: EF-Mount Lens/Full-Frame Format | Aperture Range: f/2.8 to f/22 | One XLD Element, Five LD Elements | eBAND, BBAR, and Fluorine Coatings | Ultrasonic Silent Drive Autofocus Motor | VC Image Stabilization | Dust and Moisture-Resistant Construction | Removable Arca-Compatible Tripod Mount | Rounded Nine-Blade Diaphragm | Compatible with TAP-in Console
